main.name: Syifa Amara Dhestyani
main.shortDesc: Computer Engineering graduate passionate about software engineering, mobile development, cybersecurity, DevSecOps, and Data Analytics.

about.title: Computer Engineering Graduate
about.about: Hello! I'm Syifa Amara Dhestyani, a Computer Engineering graduate from Telkom University with a passion for software engineering, data analytics, cybersecurity, and DevSecOps. Through internships and academic projects, I have developed experience in web and mobile application development, backend systems, machine learning, and automated security testing. I enjoy solving real-world problems through technology, continuously learning new tools, and building solutions that are efficient, scalable, and user-oriented. I'm currently seeking opportunities where I can contribute, grow professionally, and create meaningful impact through technology.

projects.name: Mobile SAST & DAST Automation

projects.name: Document Management System

desc: Relevant Coursework: Machine Learning, Computer Networks, Cybersecurity, Database Systems, Operating Systems, Software Engineering.
Final Project: Automated Mobile SAST and DAST System.
Developed JagaGrid, a Flutter-based mobile application for monitoring high-risk trees near PLN power transmission lines.
Integrated Firebase for real-time database, GPS location tracking, and field reporting.
Implemented GIS-based monitoring features and Telegram notification integration.
Skills: Flutter · Firebase · GPS · GIS · Telegram API
Developed backend systems and database architecture for a Document Management System using PHP, CodeIgniter 4, and MySQL.
Implemented CRUD operations, JWT Authentication, and Role-Based Access Control (RBAC).
Collaborated using Agile methodology and integrated backend services with frontend components.
Skills: PHP · CodeIgniter 4 · MySQL · JWT · RBAC · REST API
